Here is the complete action plan for Fatima Muller (ZIP 60644):

1. MODIFY ORDER #W6851636 — Running Shoes:
   • Change size: 8 → 10
   • Change color: red → white
   • (material and sole remain unchanged from current: leather / EVA)
   • Payment/refund method: paypal_5541158

2. RETURN ORDER #W2435638 — all five items:
   • Bookshelf
   • Digital Camera
   • Gaming Mouse
   • Garden Hose
   • Espresso Machine
   • Refund method: paypal_5541158

3. CHANGE SHIPPING ADDRESS for ORDER #W2040365 (same address as #W9962383):
   • address1: 377 River Road
   • address2: Suite 307
   • city: Chicago
   • state: IL
   • zip: 60644
   • country: USA

4. MODIFY ORDER #W2040365 — Espresso Machine:
   • Change pressure: 9 bar → 15 bar
   • Change capacity: 2L → 1L
   • Change type: automatic → manual
   • Payment method: paypal_5541158

5. CANCEL ORDER #W9962383:
   • Reason: ordered by mistake
